company.name_jp: 株式会社ＩＳＴソフトウェア

research_notes: Researched for individual executive social profiles (LinkedIn/Twitter). No profiles found via website scraping. Web search API unavailable (MiniMax key missing). Company website accessed on 2026-06-26, found representative director: 瀬端 伸一. Company provides system development, outsourcing, AI and cloud support services to promote corporate DX. Founded in 1976, 50th anniversary in 2026. Part of A-Net Group.
